purpose: Main audio playback application for Electron-based music player with support for multiple audio formats, MIDI playback, and real-time pitch/time manipulation
architecture: Electron renderer process with modular components including audio contexts, pipeline management, window controls, and IPC communication

classes.name: RubberbandPipeline
classes.purpose: Handles real-time pitch shifting and time stretching using rubberband library

main_functions.name: init
main_functions.purpose: Initialize application components including audio contexts, configuration handling, and IPC event listeners

main_functions.name: appStart
main_functions.purpose: Set up UI elements, event handlers, and initial playback state after initialization

main_functions.name: playAudio
main_functions.purpose: Handle playback of different file types (MIDI, tracker modules, FFmpeg-supported formats) with appropriate pipeline selection

main_functions.name: switchPipeline
main_functions.purpose: Switch between normal and rubberband audio pipelines for real-time processing

main_functions.name: clearAudio
main_functions.purpose: Clean up current audio playback and reset state before switching tracks

features: Multi-format audio support (MIDI, tracker modules, FFmpeg codecs)
Real-time pitch shifting and time stretching with rubberband library
Monitoring window integration for waveform analysis
MIDI soundfont support with user/customizable libraries
Volume control with keyboard wheel support
key_data_structures: g - Global state object containing audio contexts, players, configuration, and UI references
g.config_obj - Configuration manager for persistent settings
g.windows - Object tracking open windows by type
g.audioParams - Audio processing parameters (mode, tapeSpeed, pitch, tempo, formant)
